patch.value: Generate pm_run action-list description from PM_TOOL_ACTIONS to end prose/enum drift
server.ts hand-writes the pm_run action list in prose; new actions (schema, history-repair, history-redact) require manual edits or agents get no discoverability hint.
Action description computed from PM_TOOL_ACTIONS (plus dynamic package section); test asserts it includes schema+history-repair; adding an action auto-appears.
server.ts hand-writes the pm_run action list in prose; new actions (schema, history-repair, history-redact) require manual edits or agents get no discoverability hint.

value.author: mcp-platform-subagent
value.text: Derived the pm_run action list from canonical PM_TOOL_ACTIONS (imported from src/sdk/cli-contracts/enum-contracts.js). Added PM_RUN_ACTION_DESCRIPTION = `Operation name (one of): ${PM_TOOL_ACTIONS.join(', ')}. ` + trailing package-owned-dynamic-actions prose. Replaced the hand-maintained hardcoded action enumeration in the pm_run tool def with this constant, ending prose/enum drift. Trailing prose about dynamically-installed package actions preserved verbatim.

patch.value: Shipped in pm-at83. The pm_run action-list description is now derived from the canonical PM_TOOL_ACTIONS enum via PM_RUN_ACTION_DESCRIPTION (`Operation name (one of): ` + PM_TOOL_ACTIONS.join(', ') + the package-owned dynamic-actions prose), replacing the hand-maintained hardcoded list so the MCP-facing description can no longer drift from the actual supported actions. The new handshake test asserts every PM_TOOL_ACTIONS entry appears in the description. Verified: full suite green + manual check.
